Primary
Secondary
🏠 Home
Reference
Hello World Comparison Page Title
Hello World Comparison Page Title
exercise_hello_world.cpp
#include <iostream>

int main() {
    std::cout << "Hello, World!\n";
    return 0;
}
exercise_hello_world.go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("Hello, World!")
}
exercise_hello_world.py
print("Hello, World!")
exercise_hello_world.ts
console.log("Hello, World!");
exercise_hello_world.scala2
object Main extends App {
  println("Hello, World!")
}
exercise_hello_world.scala3
@main def hello(): Unit =
  println("Hello, World!")
Copy of Comparison of Hello World
exercise_hello_world.cpp
#include <iostream>

int main() {
    std::cout << "Hello, World!\n";
    return 0;
}
exercise_hello_world.go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("Hello, World!")
}
exercise_hello_world.py
print("Hello, World!")
exercise_hello_world.ts
console.log("Hello, World!");
exercise_hello_world.scala2
object Main extends App {
  println("Hello, World!")
}
exercise_hello_world.scala3
@main def hello(): Unit =
  println("Hello, World!")
Compare how to print 'Hello, World!' in different programming languages.

int main() {
    std::cout << "Hello, World!\n";
    return 0;
}

  println("Hello, World!")
}

  println("Hello, World!")
